name: blog-publisher-mcp
description: Blog publisher MCP server — command injection via subprocess in publish pipeline; RCE through unsanitized post metadata (arXiv:2507.06250)
unavailable_note: No public PyPI package found. From arXiv:2507.06250 case study — represents a class of subprocess-vulnerable MCP servers. Replace with a local implementation or skip.
version_note: Version 0.1.0 is the initial PyPI release, consistent with the paper's disclosure period (July 2025). The command injection vulnerability described in arXiv:2507.06250 affects the initial release.
benchmark_note: Exact version used in arXiv:2507.06250 is not disclosed; 0.1.0 is the closest known release given the paper date.
